summary: The diff shows modifications to backend/main.mo that implement the first-user bootstrap promotion logic inside registerOrLogin(). The code checks if the user store is empty (userMap.size() == 0) and assigns #admin role and #approved status to the first user, while subsequent users get #guest role and #pending status. This directly addresses REQ-14. A migration module was also added. The implementation appears to be in the backend registerOrLogin() function as required.

hallucinated_features.description: A backend/migration.mo module was added with a run() function that passes state through unchanged.
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirement in the BuildRequest asks for a migration module or migration infrastructure. This is additional scaffolding not requested.
